text:
Katsuragi may refer to:
Dr. Katsuragi
Katsuragi Expedition
Misato Katsuragi, a character from the Neon Genesis Evangelion series.

Hideaki Katsuragi, a character from the Evangelion Detective game.

Misato Katsuragi, a character from the Neon Genesis Evangelion: ANIMA novel.

Misato Katsuragi, a character from the Rebuild of Evangelion film series.
